title: Verbatim records
doc_html:
Rule 13.96. Verbatim records

By vote of a majority of its members a committee may cause a verbatim record of all or any portion of any meeting to be made and preserved.
doc_text:
Rule 13.96. Verbatim records
By vote of a majority of its members a committee may cause a verbatim record of all or any portion of any meeting to be made and preserved.
